comment: Query set for the committed 1,000-note benchmark vault (fixtures/vault-1k, seed 42). Same terms as the 10k default; read targets re-picked for this vault's sampled notes (per-vault coupling — read targets are scale-specific).

reads._hint: Stable for the committed seed-42 1k vault: small ≈ 2 KB (median), large ≈ 389 KB.
